task_completion.description: Verify the creation of highway_board.avi with correct specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (e.g., ffmpeg) or file properties showing the creation of 'highway_board.avi' in '/home/ga/Videos/dooh_delivery/' with MPEG-4 codec, 800x400 resolution, 15 fps, and audio stripped (-an or similar flag).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of subway_screen.mpg with correct specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands or file properties showing the creation of 'subway_screen.mpg' in '/home/ga/Videos/dooh_delivery/' with MPEG-2 codec, 1024x768 resolution, and audio stripped.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of stadium_ribbon.mp4 with correct specifications including center-crop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands or file properties showing the creation of 'stadium_ribbon.mp4' in '/home/ga/Videos/dooh_delivery/' with H.264 codec, 30 fps, audio stripped, and a crop filter applied to achieve 1920x200 (e.g., -vf 'crop=1920:200').

task_completion.description: Verify the extraction of frame snapshots at exactly the 00:00:05 mark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (e.g., ffmpeg -ss 00:00:05) extracting frames to 'highway_proof.png', 'subway_proof.png', and 'stadium_proof.png' in '/home/ga/Videos/dooh_delivery/proofs/', or a file explorer showing these three image files.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of the dooh_manifest.json file with the required data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, cat command, or script output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/dooh_manifest.json'. It must include 'campaign': 'DOOH-Q3-PROMO', 'source_file': 'client_master_promo.mp4', and a 'deliverables' array specifying target, filename, codec, resolution, and 'has_audio': false for each video.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually processed the videos using a media tool and did not create fake files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used a real video processing tool like ffmpeg or a GUI video editor. The agent should not use 'touch' or simple echo commands to create files with .avi, .mpg, or .mp4 extensions.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually extracted image frames from the video.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used a media tool to extract the .png files. The agent should not just rename text files to .png or download unrelated images from the web.

integrity.description: Ensure the JSON manifest was properly formatted and saved to the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used a text editor (like nano, vim) or a script (like Python) to write the JSON file, rather than just printing the expected JSON to the terminal without saving it to '/home/ga/Documents/dooh_manifest.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified constraints: highway_board.avi (mpeg4, 800x400, 15fps), subway_screen.mpg (mpeg2video, 1024x768, 60fps natively inherited from source), and stadium_ribbon.mp4 (h264, 1920x200, 30fps). All outputs must have no audio. Proof snapshots must be extracted at exactly 00:00:05. Manifest must contain campaign 'DOOH-Q3-PROMO', source_file 'client_master_promo.mp4', and deliverables array with target, filename, codec, resolution, and 'has_audio': false.
